REIS IA LOGO SYSTEM DESIGN SYSTEM v1.0

Logo System

The H1-B "Open Intersection" Hourglass is the sole brand mark for Reis IA. It represents the scarcity of time and the multiplying power of AI systems.

[01] The H1-B Hourglass
H1-B "Open Intersection" Hourglass

Construction

The mark is constructed from 6 straight lines within a 64x64 unit grid. Two horizontal lines (top and bottom) connect to a center intersection point through four diagonal lines. The "open intersection" design means the center point is where all paths converge — representing the moment AI meets business strategy.

Brand Connection

The hourglass represents TIME — the most scarce resource in business. AI systems multiply time. The geometric precision of the mark reflects the systematic, engineered approach Reis IA brings to AI implementation.

Stroke Specifications

  • Stroke width: 1.5px
  • Line cap: Round
  • Line join: Round
  • ViewBox: 0 0 64 64
[02] Logo Variants
REIS IA
Primary — Icon + Wordmark
Icon Only
REIS IA
White Variant
[03] Clear Space & Minimum Size

Clear Space

The minimum clear space around the logo is equal to the height of the top horizontal bar. No other visual element may encroach on this zone.

Dashed line = minimum clear space boundary

Minimum Sizes

Below these sizes, the mark's stroke detail is lost. Always respect minimum sizes for legibility.

32px — Digital min
24px — Favicon min
16px — Too small
[04] Watermark Usage

The hourglass mark is used as a large background watermark at 3-5% opacity (200-300px) behind key sections. This creates a visual anchor unique to the Reis IA brand.

Content sits above the watermark

The hourglass watermark at 3-5% opacity creates depth without competing with content.

[05] Logo Usage Rules
Do
  • Use the hourglass in sections about time, efficiency, urgency, and AI impact.
  • Use as a 3-5% opacity watermark (200-300px) behind key sections.
  • Place where it reinforces the narrative of the section it anchors.
  • Use accent blue or white color only.
Don't
  • Use any other icon as a brand watermark. The hourglass is the sole brand mark.
  • Animate the hourglass with rotation or flipping. It is a static, grounded symbol.
  • Force the hourglass into every section mechanically. Use it with intention.
  • Use the hourglass as a bullet icon in body text. It is an architectural element.
  • Add drop shadows, gradients, or 3D effects to the mark.
  • Use gold, amber, or any color other than accent blue or white.
REIS IA

Design System v1.0 — the single source of truth for the Reis IA brand identity, tokens, components, and patterns.
